title: chamaecytisus ciliatus subsp. alpestris
intro: Chamaecytisus ciliatus subsp. alpestris, also known as the Alpine broom or Mountain broom, is a plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Chamaecytisus ciliatus subsp. alpestris is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
